Query.SQL: SELECT SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED) AS "C.CO_AMOUNT" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS IN ('LIVE', 'PAID')
SELECT SUM(AD.DEBT_AMOUNT_ALLOWED) AS "C.SCHEDULE_2_AMOUNT" FROM ALLOWED_DEBTS AD WHERE AD.DEBT_CO_NUMBER = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND AD.DEBT_STATUS = 'SCHEDULE2'
SELECT SUM(P.AMOUNT) AS "C.PASSTHROUGH_AMOUNT" FROM PAYMENTS P WHERE P.SUBJECT_NO = ${CO.CO_NUMBER} AND P.PASSTHROUGH = 'Y' AND P.ERROR_INDICATOR != 'Y'
